hero.headline:
Moments Worth
Remembering
hero.subheadline: Beautiful gift baskets & balloon arrangements for every occasion — because some moments deserve to be unforgettable.

products.title: Our Collections
products.subtitle: Every basket is handcrafted with care, filled with premium items, and wrapped with love.

items.name: Breakfast Baskets
items.description: Start their morning with warmth — coffee, pastries, fresh flowers, and a whole lot of love.

items.name: Mother's Day
items.description: Honor the woman who does it all with a basket as beautiful and extraordinary as she is.

items.name: Birthday Celebrations
items.description: Make every birthday extraordinary with a curated basket and balloon arrangement.

items.name: Custom Arrangements
items.description: Your vision, beautifully crafted. We build baskets around what makes them smile.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps to the perfect gift.

steps.title: Choose Your Basket
steps.description: Browse our collections or describe your vision for a completely custom creation.

steps.title: Personalize It
steps.description: Add a handwritten note, choose a theme, or request specific items — we make it yours.

steps.title: Delivered with Love
steps.description: Receive your handcrafted basket, beautifully packaged and ready to create a lasting memory.

contact.title: Request Your Basket
contact.subtitle: Tell us about the occasion and we'll create something beautiful together.
contact.whatsappDescription: Send us a message directly and we'll respond right away.

form.name: Your Name
form.messagePlaceholder: Date, recipient name, preferences, budget, anything that helps us create something perfect...
form.successMessage: We'll reach out within 24 hours to discuss the details.
form.errorMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again or contact us via WhatsApp.

footer.description: Handcrafted gift baskets & balloon arrangements for every occasion, delivered with love in Central Florida.
